runbooks.label: Morning Review
runbooks.description: Review the daily briefing, scheduled-job posture, unified stream, and current governor status before widening automation for the day.

runbooks.label: Pause or Resume Automation
runbooks.description: Pause a lane or resume it through the governor when you need to halt background automation without touching SSH or Docker directly.

runbooks.label: Provider Exhaustion Recovery
runbooks.description: Inspect quota pressure, reserve posture, and provider fallback state; then prefer local execution or handoff-only modes when premium lanes are constrained.

runbooks.label: Provider Evidence Capture
runbooks.description: Use the automated Vault LiteLLM probe or explicit CLI evidence paths to convert weak provider lanes into concrete observed, auth-failed, or unsupported states.

runbooks.label: VAULT LiteLLM Provider Auth Repair
runbooks.description: Use the live provider probe, secret-surface report, and VAULT runtime checks to restore missing upstream provider env delivery for auth-failed LiteLLM API lanes.

runbooks.label: Local Runtime Env Bootstrap
runbooks.description: Verify DESK-local runtime env delivery for Redis-backed script lanes and keep the secret-bearing env file out of tracked source.

runbooks.label: DEV Secret-Delivery Normalization
runbooks.description: Audit DEV cron and systemd credential delivery read-only first, then normalize runtime.env and envfile-backed surfaces during an intentional maintenance pass.

runbooks.label: Governor Facade Rollback and Audit
runbooks.description: Use the runtime migration report, cutover packet, and retirement runbook to audit the completed DEV cutover and preserve rollback evidence for the retired :8760 surface.

runbooks.label: Software-Core Autonomy Operations
runbooks.description: Use the autonomy activation report, governor posture, and provider evidence to operate and audit post-cutover software-core autonomy, with `expanded_core_phase_2` still blocked by `vault_provider_auth_repair` until the broader phase is explicitly promoted.

runbooks.label: Stuck Queue Recovery
runbooks.description: Use governor posture, scheduled-job state, and execution-run lineage to identify paused, deferred, or blocked work and restore forward progress safely.

runbooks.label: Sovereign Routing Verification
runbooks.description: Confirm refusal-sensitive or private work stayed on sovereign local lanes and that cloud-safe work remained eligible for frontier supervision.

runbooks.label: Restore Drill
runbooks.description: Verify the ordered recovery posture for Redis, Qdrant, Neo4j, and dashboard/agent deployment state using the governed non-destructive restore rehearsal.

runbooks.label: Incident Review
runbooks.description: Use the operator stream, synthetic operator tests, and release-ladder posture to understand failures, retries, fallback behavior, and recovery decisions.
